'''Sedrians''' were a people native to the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Sedrians were [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] about three [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, covered in sleek [[Color/Legends|yellow]], brown, or gray [[Hair/Legends|fur]]. They had two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] with web-fingered hands, a pair of stabilizing fins at their hips, and legs which were joined together into a pair of tail flukes. The whiskers on their head could detect movement or changing electric fields underwater. Unlike most aquatic mammals, Sedrians had both gills and [[Lung/Legends|lungs]].

==Society and history==
[[File:Sedrian1.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A Sedrian.]]
Sedrian society was based on the worship of the [[Golden Sun]], a communal [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] intelligence living in a coral reef. Golden Sun was kept in a dome in the Sedrian capital city of [[Fitsay]], where it provided a source of energy for the Sedrians' early industrial technology. All Sedrian technology was based on energy from the Golden Sun—even their medical science was limited to leaving the sick or injured in the Golden Sun's cavern so the Golden Sun could use [[Force healing/Legends|Force healing]] on them. The [[High Priest of the Golden Sun]] was the ruler of Sedri. Ironically, though the Sedrians worshipped Golden Sun, they did not realize that it was an intelligent, living being. Sedrian [[Warrior monk]]s served under the High Priest.

Few Sedrians were found away from Sedri, primarily because separation from the Golden Sun made them agitated, anxious, and sometimes violent. Those who were found offworld were usually [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. Some of these Sedrians worked as underwater researchers or explorers. Among the exceptions were the [[Shahlik family]], who maintained the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] aquaria on [[Kailor V]]. This family, however, had lived away from Sedri for several generations.

After a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] group helped the Sedrians drive an Imperial garrison away from Sedri, the Sedrians became supporters of the Alliance, and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. A Sedrian sat on the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="TBSB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[SedriMotors Ltd.|SedriMotors]] manufactured the [[Amphibion]] aquatic assault vessels used by the New Republic during the [[Battle of Calamari]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].
